scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:demo
scripts.pack:lib: npm run build:lib && cd dist/cookie-consent && npm pack
scripts.release:patch: npm --prefix projects/cookie-consent version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version
scripts.release:minor: npm --prefix projects/cookie-consent version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version
scripts.release:major: npm --prefix projects/cookie-consent version major --no-git-tag-version && npm version major --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version
